jsonLd.title: EaseMyTrip is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a E-commerce Executive in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
